title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the provided email
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Enter an email that already exists in the system (e.g., existing@example.com) in the email field
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use (e.g., 'Email already registered')
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with password less than 8 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a password of 7 characters or less (e.g., Pass123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters is accepted
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the provided email
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a password of exactly 7 characters (e.g., Pass123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
User remains on the account creation page

title: SQL injection attempt in email field during account creation
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a SQL injection payload in the email field (e.g., ' OR 1=1; -- )
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
The system does not execute the SQL injection payload
An appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid email format') or the input is sanitized
No data breach or unauthorized access occurs

title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt in email field during account creation
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter an XSS payload in the email field (e.g., <script>alert('XSS')</script>@example.com)
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
The system does not execute the XSS payload
The input is sanitized or an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid email format')
No script execution occurs in the browser

title: SQL injection attempt in password field during account creation
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a SQL injection payload in the password field (e.g., ' OR 1=1; -- )
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
The system does not execute the SQL injection payload
An appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid password format') or the input is sanitized
No data breach or unauthorized access occurs

title: Cross-site scripting (XSS) attempt in password field during account creation
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter an XSS payload in the password field (e.g., <script>alert('XSS')</script>)
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
The system does not execute the XSS payload
The input is sanitized or an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid password format')
No script execution occurs in the browser

title: Account creation with email missing '@' symbol is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter an email address without '@' symbol (e.g., 'testuserexample.com') in the email field
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating invalid email format
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with email missing domain is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter an email address without domain (e.g., 'testuser@') in the email field
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating invalid email format
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with empty email field is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Leave the email field empty
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that email is required
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with empty password field is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that password is required
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with email containing leading/trailing spaces is handled correctly
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the trimmed email
test_steps: Enter an email address with leading and trailing spaces (e.g., '  testuser@example.com  ') in the email field
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully (spaces are trimmed) OR account creation fails with an error message about invalid email format
If successful, the account is created with the trimmed email address

title: Account creation with email case sensitivity is handled correctly
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
An existing account with email 'testuser@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Enter the same email but with different case (e.g., 'TestUser@Example.com') in the email field
Enter a valid password (e.g., Password123) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails (email uniqueness is case-insensitive)
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
User remains on the account creation page

title: Account creation with password of exactly 12 characters is accepted
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the provided email
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a password of exactly 12 characters (e.g., Pass12345678) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login page or dashboard

title: Account creation with password of 13 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid email address (e.g., testuser@example.com) in the email field
Enter a password of 13 characters (e.g., Pass123456789) in the password field
Click the 'Create Account' or 'Submit' button
expected_results: Account creation fails
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at most 12 characters long
User remains on the account creation page
